figures.caption: Figure 2: Overview of the decoupled agentic architecture, showcasing four steps of the under-supplied supermarkets example. Red marks tool calls. Green marks the returned information.
Table 3: From German to English translated data examples used in this work.

Table 1: LLM as a judge validation performed on a sub collection of the evaluation dataset. Ratings were multiplied by 100 to set their interval between 0 and 100. Ratings of the for evaluation runs of LLM judges were averaged. Mean rating should be as close as possible to the human base line. MAE should be as low as possible. Pearson r should be as high as possible. Bold marks best LLM metric.
